calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katherine Murphy for Jean Robinson (Conservator of the Estate). Elizabeth Hansen for and with Kenneth Kendall.

Ms. Hansen stated that the Conservatorship was working on the bank account. Ms. Murphy expressed that she wanted to move forward on the trust law issue and presented the stipulation regarding the trust law. The Court directed Ms. Murphy to file the original and provide an endorsed copy to the Court. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.
